request_payload.exposure_text: Just met with our local emergency management team. They said the new civil defense funding is being wasted on over-engineered bunkers while basic community preparedness programs are underfunded. My neighbor's kid's school lost their disaster drill funding last month - where are our priorities? #NationalSecurity #CommunityFirst
